_comment: Representative symbols scored by tools/compare_symbol_render.py: each renders through the OpenFL vector path and is compared to its Adobe @4x raster under vector-art/png/. Per-case scale/bg/thresholdPercent/thresholdRms override the manifest defaults. thresholdRms is the meaningful gate; thresholdPercent is report-only (gradient/anti-alias diffs keep it near 100%). thresholdRms values lock in current fidelity as a regression baseline.

cases._comment: Pure static-text symbol: validates authored #254489 labels, black 'by' text, and separate XFL static-text left offsets composed with element matrices.
cases.name: credits-art-pg1
